SECRET_KEY.description: Flask session secret key. Set a fixed value to persist sessions across restarts.

GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID.description: Google OAuth2 Client ID. Get this from Google Cloud Console → APIs & Services → Credentials.

GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET.description: Google OAuth2 Client Secret. Get this from Google Cloud Console → APIs & Services → Credentials.

ALLOWED_EMAIL.description: Your Google account email address. Only this email will be allowed to log in (e.g. you@gmail.com).
